title: Faster Launch & Rock-Solid Stability
description: We've supercharged RPLY's startup speed and squashed several critical crashes that were affecting the onboarding experience and daily use. This release is all about making your messaging experience smoother and more reliable from the moment you open the app.
features: Significantly faster app launch times with optimized startup performance
fixes: Fixed a crash that occurred during onboarding when viewing the reply tutorial
Resolved multiple crash issues affecting sidebar navigation and message interactions
Fixed a stability issue that could cause crashes when dismissing conversations
Improved overall app stability with better memory management across the interface
